title: Nalukulangara Devi Temple
tagline: Nalukulangara Devi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Nalukulangara Maha Devi Temple is situated in Kuthiathode Panchayath in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Nalukulangara Maha Devi Temple is situated in Kuthiathode Panchayath in Kerala, India. It is a prominent Devi temple in Alappuzha. It is situated 1 km from Pattukulangara Junction. It hosts the idol of the goddess Bhadrakali (popularly known as "Nalukulangara Amma") together with Sivan, Subrahmanyan, Bhalabhadra, etc.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kodamthuruth
topPlaces.description: Kodamthuruth is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a panchayat, which comes under the Aroor Assembly constituency.

topPlaces.name: Thuravoor, Cherthala
topPlaces.description: Thuravoor (IPA: [t̪urɐʋuːr̩]) is a gram panchayat in the Pattanakkad Block of Cherthala Taluk of the Alappuzha District, State of Kerala, India. It comes under Aroor Assembly constituency.

topPlaces.name: Pallithode
topPlaces.description: Pallithode is a village in the Alappuzha district, in the state of Kerala, India, on the shores of the Arabian Sea at the west and Backwaters in the east. Pallithode comes under the Gram Panchayats of Kuthiathode and Thuravoor, Pattanakad Block, of Cherthala Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Chammanad Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Chammanad Devi Temple or Chammanad Bhadrakali Temple is a temple located 200 metres from the National Highway, between Vyttila and the town of Cherthala (16 km from each place). It is situated in Kodamthuruth neighbourhood of Alappuzha, Kerala in India.

topPlaces.name: Thaikattussery
topPlaces.description: Thycattusserry is a village in the Cherthala taluk of the Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kuthiathode
topPlaces.description: Kuthiathode is a gram panchayat in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is only 20 minutes from Kochi city.

topPlaces.name: Eramalloor
topPlaces.description: Eramalloor is a village in Ezhupunna Grama Panchayat in the Cherthala taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Manakkodam Lighthouse
topPlaces.description: Manakkodam Lighthouse is situated next to the Andhakaranazhy beach in the Alappuzha district of Kerala near Cherthala. The tower is a 33.8 metres (110.9 ft) high concrete structure with square cross section.

items.note: Kodamthuruth is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a panchayat, which comes under the Aroor Assembly constituency.

Pallithode is a village in the Alappuzha district, in the state of Kerala, India, on the shores of the Arabian Sea at the west and Backwaters in the east. Pallithode comes under the Gram Panchayats of Kuthiathode and Thuravoor, Pattanakad Block, of Cherthala Taluk.

Chammanad Devi Temple or Chammanad Bhadrakali Temple is a temple located 200 metres from the National Highway, between Vyttila and the town of Cherthala (16 km from each place). It is situated in Kodamthuruth neighbourhood of Alappuzha, Kerala in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nalukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nalukulangara Devi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nalukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nalukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nalukulangara Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nalukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nalukulangara Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nalukulangara Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodamthuruth, Thuravoor, Cherthala, Pallithode, Chammanad Devi Temple, Thaikattussery.
